prompt:
A generic medical-product instruction illustration in simple black line-art on a pure white background, in the universal patient-information-leaflet style. Subject: a simple clean line-art drawing of a kitchen WASTE BIN / TRASH CAN with a swing-top lid. No hand, no falling object, no other elements — just the trash bin centered in the canvas as a clear standalone illustration.

WASTE BIN:
- A standard rectangular plastic kitchen waste bin drawn in 3/4 view, with proportions roughly 1.5x as tall as wide. Clean smooth plastic outlines, slightly tapered (narrower at the base, wider at the top).
- A SWING-TOP LID sits on top of the bin — a flat lid with a CENTRAL OVAL OPENING. The swing-top is in its resting / partially-open state, showing the oval opening clearly so the viewer reads the bin as one that opens at the top for trash entry. The inner flap can be drawn slightly tilted to suggest the swing mechanism.
- No labels, no logos, no text, no markings on the bin.
- Plain clean rectangular silhouette with clean straight outlines and gentle rounded corners where appropriate (like a typical white kitchen trash can).

ABSOLUTE SCALE: the trash bin is centered in the canvas, taking up most of the central area. Generous white margins around it.

Style: uniform medium-weight black ink lines on clean white. NO color anywhere — pure black line-art on white. Minimal short parallel hatching only for subtle volume on the bin's curved edges and the swing-top opening interior. No frame, no border, no caption, no labels, no logos, no numbers, no arrows, no decorative elements. Subject centered in a 1:1 square composition with generous clean white margins. Drawn-by-hand line work, generic patient information leaflet illustration style.
